recommendations.title: Refresh ad creatives — CTR fatigue detected
recommendations.description: CTR has dropped from 4.6% to ~2.3% over 3 weeks. Rotate in new creatives for Ángulo 2 and Ángulo 3. Keep Ángulo 4_V3 and Ángulo 5_V2 as controls.

recommendations.title: Investigate Mar 30 contact spike (25 contacts)
recommendations.description: 25 new contacts on a single day = 3.4x average. Determine if replicable.

recommendations.title: Fix website engagement — bounce rate at 100%
recommendations.description: Multiple days with 100% bounce rate and 0% engagement rate. Leaking paid traffic.

recommendations.title: Scale Meta Ads budget on winning creatives
recommendations.description: CPC at 0.45-0.48€ on best days. Increase daily budget 30-50% on Ángulo 4_V3 and 5_V2.

recommendations.title: Understand appointment activation source
recommendations.description: Appointments went from 0 (Mar 13-21) to 4-6/day (Mar 22+). Most important signal of the month.

recommendations.title: Push SEO content into top 5
recommendations.description: Average position improved to 7.05. Add internal links to push top pages into click-generating positions (<5).

recommendations.title: Pipeline tracking gap — 0 opportunities despite 44 appointments
recommendations.description: GHL shows 0 opportunities and 0 pipeline value. Pipeline stages not being used or tracking gap.
